title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd!
